name: Arrow Pathway
author: Poki
description: Arrow Pathway is a platform puzzle game challenging you to guide the character to the exit! In this unique adventure, instead of directly controlling the character's movements, your goal is to create pathways for them to follow by placing directional arrows on the platform. Stuck on a level? No problem! Hints are available to demonstrate how to complete each level. Can you lead the character to success? How to play Arrow Pathway? Click on the arrow to move it, and click again to place the arrow down. Who created Arrow Pathway? Arrow Pathway is created by Robert Alvarez.They have other thinking games on Poki : Blockins , One Button Bounce , Two Button Bounce , Ledge Throw , Platform Countdown , Hop Warp , Plactions , Jumping Clones , Big Tall Small , Teleport Jumper , Block Toggle , Isotiles , Chessformer , Resizer and Time Clones ! How can I play Arrow Pathway for free? You can play Arrow Pathway for free on Poki. Can I play Arrow Pathway on mobile devices and desktop? Arrow Pathway can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
